seoTitle: McIlwraith vs McIntosh Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between McIlwraith and McIntosh Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: McIlwraith vs McIntosh Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in McIlwraith and McIntosh Creek.
heading: McIlwraith vs McIntosh Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between McIlwraith, Queensland and McIntosh Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: McIlwraith has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to McIntosh Creek (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is McIlwraith or McIntosh Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: McIlwraith has a flood risk score of 39/100, while McIntosh Creek scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: McIlwraith scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. McIntosh Creek scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in McIlwraith or McIntosh Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. McIlwraith has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
